  "sql": "SELECT SUM(mrr_amt) AS current_mrr FROM (SELECT sub_id, mrr_amt FROM sub_evt WHERE evt_dt = (SELECT MAX(evt_dt) FROM sub_evt s2 WHERE s2.sub_id = sub_evt.sub_id) AND evt_typ_cd != 'CANCEL') t",
